title: Jump between all main sections via the sidebar
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate from the home page through all main sections using the fixed sidebar and the active section indicator updates each time.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar link to go to the overview page
Click the sidebar link to go to the retail page
Click the sidebar link to go to the attractions page
Click the sidebar link to go to the events page
Verify the events page content is displayed
Verify the active sidebar navigation item reflects the current page

title: Navigate between key sections via sidebar
description: Verifies a visitor can use the fixed sidebar to navigate across the main routes and the correct page loads each time with the active nav state updating.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the sidebar navigation link for the overview section
Click the sidebar navigation link for the retail section
Click the sidebar navigation link for the attractions section
Click the sidebar navigation link for the events section
Verify the events page content is displayed
Verify the sidebar shows the events link as the active location

title: Sidebar navigation works when starting from another section
description: Verifies a visitor can start on a non-home section and use the sidebar to navigate to another section with the active item updating.

steps.description: Navigate to /retail
Click the sidebar link to go to the attractions page
Verify the attractions page content is displayed
Verify the active sidebar navigation item reflects the current page

title: Submit a retail availability request and reset to submit another
description: Verifies a prospective tenant can submit a valid availability request, see loading then success confirmation, and reset the form to a blank state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the availability request section
Fill RetailCo in the company name field
Select a valid requirement category from the dropdown
Submit the availability request
Verify a loading spinner is displayed during submission
Verify a request received success confirmation is displayed
Click the control to submit another request
Verify the availability request form is shown again with empty fields

title: Submit a complete event booking inquiry
description: Verifies an organizer can complete the booking inquiry form with valid inputs and observe a consistent UI-only submission state without breaking continued form use.

steps.description: Navigate to /events
Fill Inquiries organization name with non-whitespace text
Select an event type from the event type dropdown
Select an expected attendance range
Submit the booking inquiry
Verify the form shows a submission state change consistent with a UI-only submit
Verify the form remains usable after submission

title: Block submission when company name is whitespace-only
description: Verifies the availability request form prevents submission with a whitespace-only company name and shows an inline validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the availability request section
Fill only whitespace into the company name field
Select a valid requirement category from the dropdown
Submit the availability request
Verify an inline company name validation error is visible
Verify the success confirmation is not displayed

title: Hero displays video or fallback background
description: Verifies the landing hero shows either the YouTube background video or a readable gradient fallback when autoplay is blocked.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero section shows a background video or a visible gradient fallback
Verify the hero section content remains readable

title: Scroll progress increases as the user scrolls down the page
description: Verifies the scroll progress indicator increases when a user scrolls down a long page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the top of the page
Scroll down to a mid-page storytelling section
Verify the scroll progress indicator shows partial progress
Scroll near the bottom of the page
Verify the scroll progress indicator shows near-complete progress

title: Clear company name validation error after entering a valid name
description: Verifies the company name validation error clears after the user replaces whitespace with a valid non-whitespace company name.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the availability request section
Fill only whitespace into the company name field
Select a valid requirement category from the dropdown
Submit the availability request
Fill RetailCo in the company name field
Submit the availability request
Verify the company name validation error is no longer visible
Verify a request received success confirmation is displayed

title: Story sections reveal while scrolling
description: Verifies a visitor can scroll through the landing page and the stats, vision, and districts sections load and become visible as the user progresses.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down to the stats section
Scroll down to the vision section
Scroll down to the districts section
Verify the statistics content is displayed
Verify the districts content is displayed

title: Scroll progress resets when navigating to a new page
description: Verifies the scroll progress indicator reflects the new page position after route changes rather than preserving the previous page's scroll state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll near the bottom of the page
Click the sidebar link to go to the overview page
Verify the overview page content is displayed
Verify the scroll progress indicator shows low progress near the top of the new page

title: Scroll progress indicator reflects page position
description: Verifies the scroll progress indicator increases as the visitor scrolls down the landing page and updates consistently with position.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to near the top of the page content
Verify the scroll progress indicator shows low progress
Scroll to near the bottom of the page content
Verify the scroll progress indicator shows high progress

title: Event booking inquiry requires organization name
description: Verifies the booking inquiry form blocks submission when the organization name is whitespace-only and allows submission once a valid name is entered.

steps.description: Navigate to /events
Fill organization name with whitespace-only text
Select an event type from the event type dropdown
Select an expected attendance range
Submit the booking inquiry
Verify a validation error is visible and submission is blocked
Fill organization name with non-whitespace text
Submit the booking inquiry
Verify the validation error is cleared

title: District card hover interaction
description: Verifies hovering a district card on the landing page triggers the intended visual emphasis on the district image.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down to the districts section
Move the pointer over a district card
Verify the district image appears visually emphasized on hover

title: Vision image hover interaction
description: Verifies hovering the vision image transitions it from grayscale toward full color with a subtle scale effect.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down to the vision section
Move the pointer over the vision image
Verify the vision image changes from grayscale to color and scales slightly on hover

title: Hero primary CTA hover and active interaction
description: Verifies the primary hero call-to-action provides hover and active feedback to indicate it is interactive.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Move the pointer over the primary hero call-to-action
Press and hold the primary hero call-to-action
Verify the call-to-action visually responds on hover and active interaction
